mapper.select: SELECT MAX(q.id) AS id, (SELECT q2.question FROM chatbot_unanswered_question q2 WHERE q2.question_norm = q.question_norm AND q2.status = #{status} ORDER BY q2.created_at DESC, q2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS question, q.question_norm AS question_norm, COUNT(*) AS frequency, MAX(q.top_similarity) AS top_similarity, MAX(q.status) AS status, MAX(q.created_at) AS last_seen FROM chatbot_unanswered_question q WHERE q.status = #{status} GROUP BY q.question_norm ORDER BY frequency DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
